description_long: This is a life-sized representation of a deer, featuring a slender, elongated body covered in a reddish-brown coat with lighter patches on the underside and legs. The deer has a prominent set of branched antlers, which are textured and slightly irregular, indicating a mature male. Its head is narrow with a slightly pointed snout, and large, upright ears are visible on either side of the head. The legs are long and thin, ending in small, cloven hooves, and the tail is short and subtly bushy. The surface of the body appears matte and slightly rough, with some visible texture variations suggesting fur. The overall form is naturalistic, capturing the alert and poised stance typical of deer in urban parks or wooded areas.
description: A reddish-brown deer with large branched antlers, upright ears, and a short bushy tail, standing in a natural alert posture. The surface is matte and textured, resembling fur.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full body, antlers, and upright ears, with the head turned slightly forward and all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back, short bushy tail, and the alignment of the legs, with antlers visible from behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lighter underbelly, full antler spread, and the deer's alert head posture.
description_view_3: Front-facing view emphasizing the face, antlers, and upright ears, with the chest and front legs most prominent.
